markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Payton Pritchard records a Double Double in the Charlotte at Boston professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 4, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Statistics are considered final at the conclusion of the specified time period of the basketball game. Statistics that count towards a double double include points, rebounds, assists, blocks, and steals. Any combination of 10+ in 2 or more of these statistics results in a double double. Corrections made after the game ends will not affect resolution. Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If the game is cancelled before starting, markets resolve to last fair price. If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.
markets.title: Payton Pritchard: Double Double

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the price criterion is met.
markets.rules_primary: If the price of ZEC after issuance and through 11:59 PM ET on Mar 31, 2026 is ever below $220.00, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: At each minute throughout the market duration, a settlement value is calculated using every minute-by-minute CF ZECUSD_RTI price for ZEC. For each of these individual minute-by-minute checks, the top 20% and bottom 20% of the cumulative dataset are removed before calculating the average of the remaining values. If the trimmed mean associated with any single minute during the period is above the threshold, the market resolves to Yes. This methodology reduces the impact of extreme price spikes or drops. The measurement period runs from when the market is issued until the specified end time. If CF Benchmarks data is unavailable or incomplete at the expiration time, affected strikes resolve to No. For cryptocurrencies with multiple versions, the Exchange will specify which version or ticker is being tracked.
markets.title: Will ZEC trimmed mean be below $220.00 by 11:59 PM ET on Mar 31, 2026?
